steps.title: Identify what the initial deposit represents
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance when $x = 0$ months have passed. On the graph of $y = f(x)$, this is the y-intercept—where the line crosses the y-axis.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept directly from the graph
steps.content: At $x = 0$, the line crosses the y-axis at $y = 20$. The initial deposit is 20 dollars.
